finding_results.notes: Ron's warning is newly phrased and specific to Hermione's fixation pattern and the Manor. Hermione's later recall now uses that revised warning instead of the borrowed style-bible wording.
The coda now lands on concrete consequences: the prepared desk, the Mark easing when she sits, and the house setting a second cup for Draco, rather than paraphrasing the same realization in abstract.

finding_results.notes: Ron's warning now contains four visible self-corrections or abandoned turns: 'I know it's not my -- I know I don't get to say this' (line 77), 'it becomes -- look' (line 81), 'I'm not -- that's not a dig' (line 85), and 'I just--' He stopped (line 89). The continuous diagnosis speech is broken by fumbling, concrete personal admission ('I watched it happen with us'), and a specific fear ('ring you in three months') replacing abstract psychological analysis. Harry's exchange is now operationally grounded -- 'ley-line theory,' 'headline,' and 'You don't. That's the problem' replace the symmetric aphorism about names meaning what they mean. Harry's final warning shortened from three-sentence wise-mentor speech to a single blunt line: 'Just -- make sure you know why you're there. That's all.' Three narrator certification passages removed: 'It landed anyway... The ambiguity only made it truer' replaced with beat action; 'He said it without edge. That made it harder to dismiss' cut entirely; 'Both men who knew her best had learned...' thesis replaced with brief observational parallel.

pass_summaries.summary: Revised Chapter 13 to replace the style-bible-derived Manor warning with scene-native language, convert the packet's clipped narration beats into full sentences, collapse the coda into a concrete Manor/Mark consequence, and clean up the sentence-level recurrence tics called out by the cross-chapter metrics.

Roughened both warning scenes to break composed-thesis quality. Ron's speech now arrives through self-corrections, abandoned turns, and concrete personal memory rather than continuous psychological diagnosis. Harry's warnings stay grounded in operational stakes (headlines, optics, Skeeter) rather than shifting into aphoristic self-knowledge. Removed all narrator certification language that told the reader a line 'landed' or admired the precision of a character's insight. Both men now sound like themselves under the pressure of saying something they know they may not be entitled to say, rather than sharing a single cleanly insightful register.

Revised the chapter's repeated precision-tic by replacing classifier diction with embodied detail in the Ron material, the Harry/decay material, and the Manor return. The chapter now clears the packet's acceptance target with zero remaining uses of `specific`, `specificity`, or `particular`.
